title: From the Earth to the Moon
author: Jules Verne
description: From the Earth to the Moon is an 1865 novel by Jules Verne. It tells the story of the Baltimore Gun Club, a post American Civil War society of weapons enthusiasts, and their attempts to build an enormous Columbiad space gun and launch three people the Gun Club's president, his Philadelphian armor-making rival, and a French poet in a projectile with the goal of a Moon landing. Five years later, Verne wrote a sequel called Around the Moon.
